name: Disney Villainous: The Worst Takes It All
description: Disney Villainous: The Worst Takes It All is Prospero Hall's asymmetric Disney-villain duel — each player picks a classic villain (Maleficent, Captain Hook, Ursula, Jafar, Prince John, or the Queen of Hearts), each with their own unique board, deck, and twisted objective drawn from their film. On your turn, move your character along your villain's storyline locations, play allies and curses from your hand, and inflict Fate cards on rivals to disrupt their plans. Six villains, six sets of rules, six different paths to evil triumph.
